textPlain: Just when I started to look back at latex to typeset some poetry of mine yesterday!Been a while since I didn't touch it, so I didn't even have texlive installed on my Ubuntu box, and started a chase of dependency to make my French specific stuff to install. I still need to see if I can manage to make the three strophe I wrote be as rectangle shaped as possible, be it with automatic line break on a vers (not sure the term in English) to the next row right aligned and preceded with a [
Not sure why is this posted here, pretty much useless without the book
Who doesn't own the third edition of the LaTeX Companion book?
